---
output: github_document
---


```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# BirdynamicPkg
The R package 'BirdynamicPkg' enables modelling the demographic impact of windfarms on seabird species following the methodology developed in the Bird Dynamic project by Chambert et al. (under review). The R package was created to support the [Bird dynamic Shiny App](https://shiny.cefe.cnrs.fr/Shiny_Bird_dynamic/) created to apply the methodology to Mainland France. The R package enables running the analyses that run in the Shiny App, but with more flexibility by adding your own colonies or editing species attributes.

## Installation

You can install the development version of BirdynamicPkg from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("BaptisteAverly/BirdynamicPkg")
```

Check out the vignette Vignette_Bird_Dynamic to see how to use the package.
